author: codex-root

patch.value:
## User story

As a coding or planning agent, I want one bounded and explainable relationship query for an item so that I can understand its purpose, execution order, downstream impact, and supporting evidence without guessing or loading unrelated history.

## Token contract

Return the smallest useful summary first: item identity, state, immediate typed edges, critical path or blockers, evidence pointers, omitted counts, and a continuation token. Expand only on explicit demand or relevance thresholds.

## Explainability contract

Every included node and edge carries a concise selection reason, source, age or freshness, and whether it is authoritative, inferred, approximate, or user-authored.
As an agent, I can traverse why an item exists, what it affects, what blocks it, and its evidence chain from one bounded graph query
Provide one explainable, token-budgeted graph read that answers origin, prerequisites, dependents, impact, and evidence without separate full-tracker scans.

One request returns bounded ancestors, prerequisites, dependents, provenance, linked evidence, and the reason each node or edge was selected; Callers control direction, kind families, depth, node and edge limits, history window, token budget, fields, and cursor continuation; Default output is compact and counts-first; expanded and JSON or JSONL modes remain composable with grep, jq, and scripts; The response distinguishes complete, truncated, sampled, approximate, stale-index, and permission-redacted results; Public SDK, thin CLI, MCP action, and shell pipelines share one contract and deterministic ordering; Tests cover disconnected items, cycles in associative edges, missing endpoints, deep paths, concurrent mutations, and million-item bounded behavior
Make relationship context directly usable by coding agents through one predictable SDK and CLI flow
Agents spend fewer tokens and tool calls reconstructing lineage and can justify every surfaced relationship
Reduces missed prerequisites, stale assumptions, duplicated work, and unbounded context dumps
A bounded graph-context response with paths, semantic edge labels, evidence, truncation metadata, and continuation
Current context comes from several list, get, deps, comments, history, and search calls while the dependency graph is under-specified

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-13: all-status review found context packing and deps visualization items but no single agent story joining bounded lineage,impact,blockers,and evidence traversal; it belongs under pm-96h7.

message: Create bounded agent relationship context story
